assertions.evidence: SOUL.md copied to target workspace with matching content. Verified file exists at TARGET_WS/SOUL.md with full source content.
assertions.details: Tested with OpenClaw fixture containing SOUL.md at source root.

assertions.evidence: Pre-existing SOUL.md preserved when running without --overwrite. Report shows conflict status. Original content unchanged.
With --overwrite, SOUL.md replaced with source content. Backup file created at OUTPUT_DIR/backups/SOUL.md.
assertions.details: Verified new content present, backup exists in backups/ directory.

assertions.evidence: IDENTITY.md created at TARGET_WS/IDENTITY.md with agent name 'TestAssistant' and role 'Helpful test assistant'.
assertions.details: Content includes: Name, Role, Personality fields from openclaw-config.json agent section.

assertions.evidence: MEMORY.md created at TARGET_WS/MEMORY.md containing entries from source. Report shows: Merged memory: 9 new entries (2 daily files), 0 duplicates.
assertions.details: Source entries from MEMORY.md plus 2 daily memory files merged with --- delimiters.

assertions.evidence: Section-level deduplication works correctly. Report shows: Merged memory: 1 new entries (0 daily files), 3 duplicates. Each section header appears exactly once.
assertions.details: Script deduplicates at entry level (## sections). When source and target have identical sections (normalized comparison), they are detected as duplicates and not re-added.

assertions.evidence: Created source MEMORY.md with 62897 chars (200 entries × 300 chars). Overflow file created at OUTPUT_DIR/memory-overflow.md (13238 bytes). Report shows: 201 new entries, 41 overflow.
assertions.details: MEMORY_CHAR_LIMIT=50000 enforced. Excess entries written to overflow file.

assertions.evidence: USER.md created at TARGET_WS/USER.md containing user profile entries from source.
assertions.details: Profile section with Name, Role, Experience and Preferences section migrated.

assertions.evidence: Daily memory files (2024-01-15.md, 2024-01-16.md) merged into target MEMORY.md. Report shows: 2 daily files processed.
assertions.details: Entries from daily files included in merged MEMORY.md with <!-- From YYYY-MM-DD.md --> markers.

assertions.evidence: AGENTS.md copied to TARGET_WS/AGENTS.md with matching content from source.
assertions.details: Full agent instructions and code style section preserved.

assertions.evidence: TOOLS.md created at TARGET_WS/TOOLS.md with tool-related content.
assertions.details: Generated from config with 'Migrated from openclaw' marker. Contains tool configuration notes.

assertions.evidence: PRINCIPLES.md created at TARGET_WS/PRINCIPLES.md with agent principles.
assertions.details: Generated from agent config (personality field). Contains 'friendly and efficient' as core principle.

frictions: Source files (SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, USER.md, AGENTS.md) must be at source root (~/.openclaw/), not in workspace/ subdirectory. The script does not check workspace/ subdirectory.
